CustomField.description: CSN at the last major Assembly Event or Performance Restoration/Overhaul according to the Assembly Events related list. Minor/Major Events are defined on the Maintenance Program Event level
CustomField.inlineHelpText: CSN at the last major Assembly Event or Performance Restoration/Overhaul according to the Assembly Events related list. Minor/Major Events are defined on the Maintenance Program Event level
CustomField.label: CSN at Last Major Event
